scripts.build:dev: tsc --project tsconfig.json --outDir extension-dev-dist && AIO_DEST_DIR=extension-dev-dist AIO_DEV_BRAND=1 node scripts/copy-static.mjs
scripts.verify: yarn build:check && yarn validate:manifest && yarn check:repo
scripts.package:extension: yarn build && yarn package:extension:nested && yarn package:extension:unpacked
scripts.package:extension:unpacked:dev: yarn build:dev && AIO_SOURCE_DIR=extension-dev-dist AIO_PACKAGE_LAYOUT=flat AIO_UNPACKED_FOLDER_NAME='All-in-One Toolkit Dev' AIO_PACKAGE_SUFFIX=dev node scripts/package-extension.mjs
